title: Everything is TNT
body:
# Everything is TNT

---

This server-side mod makes any block explosive!  
Players can light them with flint and steel.

![Nether portal](https://github.com/kgriff0n/everything-is-tnt/raw/master/img/nether_portal.gif)

Entities can also explode!   
The explosion radius is calculated based on the entity's health (don't try to light up a Warden...).

![Zombified Piglin](https://github.com/kgriff0n/everything-is-tnt/raw/master/img/zombified_piglin.gif)


| ![Flowers](https://github.com/kgriff0n/everything-is-tnt/raw/master/img/flowers.png) | ![Pumpkins](https://github.com/kgriff0n/everything-is-tnt/raw/master/img/pumpkins.png) |
|-----------------------------|-------------------------------|
| ![Cocoa](https://github.com/kgriff0n/everything-is-tnt/raw/master/img/cocoa.png)     | ![Warden](https://github.com/kgriff0n/everything-is-tnt/raw/master/img/warden.png)  |
